name: Detail Page
description: A page for viewing and editing a single record's complete details. Organized with tabs for different information categories, includes status badges, key metrics, and interactive sections like notes and timeline.
whenToUse: Viewing full details of a case, client, or application
When users need to see and edit comprehensive record information
For displaying related data organized by category (details, timeline, notes)
As the destination when clicking a row in a list page

structure.pageHeader: Record name + action buttons (Edit, Update Status)
structure.statusBadges: Row of badges showing status, priority, urgency
structure.metadataGrid: Quick stats grid (due date, assigned to, created, updated)
structure.tabs: Tabbed sections for Details, Timeline, Notes, etc.
structure.notFoundState: Error callout when record doesn't exist

notes.author: Sarah Chen
notes.content: Contacted parent regarding missing documentation. Will follow up next week.

utilities.isOverdue: Check if due date has passed

components.name: GoabText
components.purpose: Display all text content with consistent sizing

components.name: GoabCallout
components.purpose: Error state when record not found

example.description: Complete case detail page with tabs for details, timeline, and notes

tabPatterns.Details: Structured data fields organized by category
tabPatterns.Timeline: Chronological list of events with left border styling
tabPatterns.Notes: Add note form + list of existing notes

variants.name: Read-only detail
variants.description: Remove edit capabilities for view-only users

variants.name: Inline editing
variants.description: Edit fields directly on the page without separate edit mode

variants.name: With sidebar
variants.description: Quick actions or related items in a side panel

considerations: Use useParams hook to get record ID from URL
Handle loading and not-found states gracefully
Dynamic page header title based on loaded record
Tabs organize content without overwhelming the user
Timeline uses left border for visual connection
Consider optimistic updates for note adding
